name: Services page (cards layout)
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete services page (cards layout) of a UAE ministry website as a single standalone HTML page. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; a page-title banner; audience tabs (All services / Government / Business / Individual); a search field; a grid of service cards, each with an icon, title, short description, tags and an 'Explore' link; pagination; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
